grantSummary: With the STIP.b campaign, Jones plans to incentivize both new and legacy strategies. Incentives will be allocated to: jUSDC, GMX V2 strategies, liquidity management strategies, new tokenomics, and partnership campaigns that align with these strategies.

Our grant is primarily catered to help market our new Pendle PT Strategy Vaults on Arbitrum – on top of incentives to our Basic Vaults, Lending Market, and AMM. We believe that LRTs are solidifying itself as a core DeFi primitive and would help bring vibrancy and innovation to the Arbitrum ecosystem.
